_yaml:
downstream:
  format: hnap
  response_key: GetDownstreamChannelInfoResponse
  data_key: DownstreamChannel
  record_delimiter: '|+|'
  field_delimiter: '^'
  fields:
    - index: 2
      field: channel_type
      type: string
      map:
        SC-QAM: qam
        OFDM: ofdm
    - index: 3
      field: channel_id
      type: integer
    - index: 4
      field: frequency
      type: frequency
    - index: 5
      field: snr
      type: float
    - index: 6
      field: power
      type: float
  filter:
    channel_id:
      not: 0
